flagged.detail: Cloze deletion is an image and the Extra field is empty, so answer_text is identical to the question prompt 'Give the normal blood pressure range :' (no readable answer revealed).
Snell's law equation is an image-only cloze; Extra holds only images and a link, so the text answer ('Give the Snell's law equation: YouTube Link') reveals no readable equation.
Lens magnification equation is an image-only cloze; Extra has only an image and link, so the text answer ('...magnification of a lens : Khan Academy Link') reveals no readable equation.
Sigma/pi bond table is an image-only cloze; Extra contains only a link, so the text answer adds nothing beyond 'Give the number of sigma and pi bonds for each bond order'.
Index-of-refraction formula is an image-only cloze; Extra has only a link, so the text answer ('Give the formula for index of refraction : YouTube Link') reveals no readable formula.
Wave-velocity equation deletion is an image; only variable definitions (v, f, λ) are in text, so the actual equation is revealed only as an image.
Thin-lens equation deletion is an image; only variable definitions (f, d_i, d_o) are in text, so the equation itself is image-only.
Photon-energy equation deletion is an image; only variable definitions (E, h, c, λ, f) are in text, so the equation itself is image-only.
Photoelectric max-KE equation deletion is an image; only 'W = work function' is in text, so the equation itself is image-only.
Open-pipe length equation deletion is an image; Extra gives only a prose description, so the precise formula is revealed only as an image.
Closed-pipe length equation deletion is an image; Extra gives only a prose description, so the precise formula is revealed only as an image.
Heart electrical-conduction pathway deletion is an image; only the mnemonic 'Stab A Big Pickle' is in text, so the pathway is revealed only as an image.
Cardiac-output equation deletion is an image; the equation is also restated as text in Extra ('Cardiac Output = Heart Rate x Stroke Volume'), so impact is minimal.

notes: Batch 05 is 257 MileDown MCAT cloze cards (OChem isomers/bonding/reactions/alcohols/amino acids, Biology respiratory & cardiovascular systems, and Physics waves/sound/light/nuclear). It is very high quality: cloze {{cN::...}} markup, HTML, and Q/A correspondence are well-formed throughout, with zero errors or warnings and no unrendered template artifacts (equations are stored as images, not MathJax/LaTeX). The only flags are 13 info-level 'image-only' cloze cards whose deletion is a diagram or equation image; on 5 of these the Extra field adds no readable text, so the rendered answer text is essentially identical to the question prompt.
